notice_future: Bookings are possible up to one month in advance.
room_number_hint: Your room number is shown in the schedule.
pin_hint: With this PIN you can cancel the reservation from other devices. In this browser it is remembered automatically.
manage_belongs_account: This reservation belongs to your account.
manage_browser_notice: You do not need the PIN to cancel this reservation because you created it with the same browser you are currently using. To cancel from other browsers or devices, you need the PIN or an account.
manage_belongs_other: This reservation belongs to another account and cannot be cancelled here.
toast_slot_unavailable: This slot is no longer available.
toast_slot_taken: This slot was just taken by someone else.
toast_saved_guest: Reservation saved. In this browser you can cancel it again without a PIN.
toast_belongs_other: This reservation belongs to another account.
myres_retention: Past reservations stay visible for up to :days days and are then deleted automatically.
myres_browser_sub: Here you only see reservations created in this browser.
myres_browser_callout: Without an account, only bookings from this browser are shown. To access them from anywhere – including other devices – please use an account.
confirm_cancel_notice: This slot will be released again.
name: Name
complete_profile_sub: Please enter your room number so your reservations can be assigned to you.
forgot_subtitle: Enter your email to receive a password reset link
reset_subtitle: Please enter your new password below
password_hint: Ensure your account is using a long, random password to stay secure
delete_account_sub: Delete your account and all of its resources
delete_account_q: Are you sure you want to delete your account?
delete_account_notice: Once your account is deleted, all of its data — including your reservations — will be permanently deleted. Please enter your password to confirm.
delete_account_oauth_notice: You need to sign in again to confirm. Afterwards your account and all of its data — including your reservations — will be permanently deleted.
verify_notice: Please verify your email address by clicking on the link we just emailed to you.
verify_resent_registration: A new verification link has been sent to the email address you provided during registration.
verify_resent: A new verification link has been sent to your email address.
verify_resend_link: Click here to re-send the verification email.
confirm_password_area: This is a secure area of the application. Please confirm your password before continuing.
recovery_codes_hint: Recovery codes let you regain access if you lose your 2FA device. Store them in a secure password manager.
recovery_codes_each: Each recovery code can be used once to access your account and will be removed after use. If you need more, click Regenerate codes above.
recovery_codes_confirm: Please confirm access to your account by entering one of your emergency recovery codes.
twofactor_enable_hint: When you enable two-factor authentication, you will be prompted for a secure pin during login. This pin can be retrieved from a TOTP-supported application on your phone.
twofactor_pin_hint: You will be prompted for a secure, random pin during login, which you can retrieve from the TOTP-supported application on your phone.
twofactor_setup_scan: To finish enabling two-factor authentication, scan the QR code or enter the setup key in your authenticator app.
twofactor_enabled_scan: Two-factor authentication is now enabled. Scan the QR code or enter the setup key in your authenticator app.
auth_code_hint6: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app.
auth_code_hint: Enter the authentication code provided by your authenticator application.
passkey_add_sub: Add a passkey to sign in without a password
passkey_manage_sub: Manage your passkeys for passwordless sign-in
passkey_name_hint: Give this passkey a name to help you identify it later.
passkey_remove_q: Are you sure you want to remove the passkey ":name"? You will no longer be able to use it to sign in.
passkey_unsupported: Passkeys are not supported in this browser.
instruction_1: Reserve slots for washing machines and dryers up to four weeks in advance. You can book without an account — just enter a PIN that lets you cancel the reservation later. With an account, you don't need to enter a PIN or room number each time, and you can manage your reservations from any device. Reservations are deleted one day after they expire, accounts after two years of inactivity.
rule_1: You may use the appliances from 7:00 to 22:00 as to not disturb the tenants directly above the machines.
rule_2: You may remove other people's laundry from the drums and place it on the tables once your slot has started.
rule_3: Please lock the door to the laundry room when leaving to prevent any further break-ins.
rules_below_list: These rules have developed over time and are not provided by the Studierendenwerk or legally binding. However, it has proven to work well, so please use them. Thank you!
admin_manage_sub: Admins can delete any reservation and mark appliances as defective.
admin_user_not_found: No account found with this email address.
admin_already: This account is already an admin.
defective_sub: Appliances marked as defective are shown with a striped pattern in the schedule.
defective_warning: This appliance is currently marked as defective. If it is working again, please let the dorm council know.
doeneken_sub: Manage special openings and closures. Wednesdays and Fridays are open by default.
doeneken_text_hint: Custom text. {lucky} is replaced with the lucky number. Leave empty for default text.
banner_sub: Show a notice below the navigation bar on every page.
